query:
SELECT id, title, LEFT(destinationCity, 200) as destinationCity_preview, 
       CASE WHEN includes IS NOT NULL AND includes != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_includes,
       CASE WHEN excludes IS NOT NULL AND excludes != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_excludes,
       CASE WHEN noticeDetailed IS NOT NULL AND noticeDetailed != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_notices,
       CASE WHEN hotels IS NOT NULL AND hotels != '[]' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_hotels,
       CASE WHEN meals IS NOT NULL AND meals != '[]' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_meals,
       createdAt 
FROM tours 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 1;

       CASE WHEN hotels IS NOT NULL AND hotels != '[]' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_hotels,
       CASE WHEN meals IS NOT NULL AND meals != '[]' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_meals,
